name: @labs-skills/miaoshou-tiancheng
description: 妙手天成 MiaoShou TianCheng — Healing Hands. A WUJI Labs open-source skill that infuses the integrative framework of the Huangdi Neijing (treat-what-is-not-yet-ill, pattern differentiation, three-cause tailoring, body-and-spirit unity) into AI's health and wellness advice. Advisory content only, not a medical diagnosis basis.
author: WUJI (wuji-labs)
